name: Lifecycle Contract
summary: How artifact lifecycle works: 3 states, runtime auto-demotes on edit, only Gatekeeper promotes to cold.

definitions.meaning: Active work in progress. The initial state for all artifacts.
distinguishing_features: Mutable by anyone with write access

definitions.meaning: Ready for quality check. Content awaiting Gatekeeper validation.
Canonized and immutable. Final state after passing validation.
distinguishing_features: Only Gatekeeper can promote to this state

obligations.must: Request transition from draft to review when content is ready
obligations.when: Content is complete and ready for validation

obligations.must: Be the only one to promote from review to cold
Auto-demote artifacts from review to draft when edited
Move demoted artifacts from manuscript back to workspace

contracts.name: Cascade Demotion

obligations.must: Auto-demote child artifacts when parent is edited
Be aware that children may need re-validation after parent changes

examples: Editing a section_brief demotes its derived section

rules.statement: You cannot skip states - there is NO draft→cold transition
rules.reasoning: Content must pass through review first to ensure quality gates are applied.

rules.statement: Only Gatekeeper can promote artifacts to cold state
rules.reasoning: Gatekeeper judges substance via quality bars; cold promotion requires passing all checks.

heuristics.guidance: Focus on content quality; trust the runtime to manage state transitions automatically.
examples: Just create and edit content - runtime handles demotion
Delegate to Gatekeeper for cold promotion
counter_examples: Calling lifecycle tools for routine edits
Trying to promote to cold without being Gatekeeper

warnings.failure_mode: Attempting to manually manage lifecycle states
warnings.consequence: Wasted effort - runtime handles this automatically.
warnings.prevention: Focus on content; use request_lifecycle_transition only for explicit promotion.

warnings.consequence: Transition will be rejected by runtime.
warnings.prevention: Delegate to Gatekeeper for cold promotion.
